name: recipients
label: Recipients
help: Phone numbers in international format, separated by commas. Example: 33645332637,33667656608

name: message
label: Message
help: Max 160 characters per SMS. Longer messages will be split automatically.

name: name
label: Campaign Name
help: Internal name to identify the campaign in your SMS en Masse account.

name: sender
label: Sender Name
help: 3 to 11 characters, must start with a letter. Leave empty to use the default short number.

name: sendAt
label: Scheduled Send Date
help: Leave empty for immediate sending. Format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss (example: 2026-01-15 14:30:00)

name: country
label: Country
help: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Example: FR, BE, CH.

name: identifier
label: Custom Identifier
help: Your internal reference to find this campaign in your systems.

name: webhookUrl
label: Webhook URL (DLR)
help: URL to receive delivery status updates for each SMS. Use a Make webhook URL from an "SMS Campaign Status Updated" instant trigger module.
